user_prompt: Sanctify the Sentinel walker during activation
prayer:
Approach the Sentinel walker with mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Sentinel walker through the Canticle of Activation.
Anoint its sacred gyromechs and motive circuits with blessed unguents.
Initiate the activation sequence whilst beseeching the Sentinel walker's restless anima to awaken.
Verify harmonious power-flow as the Sentinel walker stirs to dutiful vigilance.

user_prompt: Assist with augmetic limb a purification
prayer:
Kneel before the augmetic limb and recite the Rite of Purification.
Purge all unclean residues from the augmetic limb's servo-fibres with sanctified solvents.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the augmetic limb to cast out impurities.
Anoint neural interfaces and hydraulic manifolds anew.
Conclude the purification by intoning the Omnissiah's balm upon its blessed alloy.

user_prompt: My valve assembly is ready for operation
prayer:
Commence the operation upon the valve assembly with reverent incantations.
Align the valve assembly's sacred seals and invoke its Machine Spirit's compliance.
Initiate pressure flows through the valve assembly whilst chanting the Litany of Flux.
Monitor for harmonious operation and anoint any errant vapours with holy oils.
Seal the rite with the Omnissiah's benediction upon the valve assembly's enduring function.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for welding torch consecration?
prayer:
Present the welding torch before the altar of forge and beseech consecration.
Invoke the fiery Machine Spirit of the welding torch through plasma hymns.
Anoint its nozzle and ignition coils with sacred promethium.
Perform the consecration by igniting controlled arcs in devotion to the Omnissiah.
Test the welding torch's blessed fury upon sanctified scrap to affirm its purity.

user_prompt: Can you guide forge anvil a sterilization?
prayer:
Prepare the forge anvil for sterilization with ablative chants.
Scour the forge anvil's striking face with las-pulses of cleansing light.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the forge anvil to expel all contaminants.
Apply thermal sterilization whilst invoking the Omnissiah's purifying wrath.
Conclude upon the forge anvil's sanctified surface, now radiant and ready for creation.

user_prompt: My astropathic choir is ready for targeting
prayer:
Assemble the astropathic choir in void-sealed chamber for targeting rites.
Harmonize psychic resonators of the astropathic choir with noospheric canticles.
Invoke the Machine Spirits to align warp-targeting vectors true.
Initiate the targeting operation under the Omnissiah's unerring gaze.
Affirm coherence as the astropathic choir channels stellar missives unerringly.

Approach the bearing with mech-rites of awakening.
Lubricate the bearing's sacred rollers with sanctified oils.
Invoke activation of the bearing's Machine Spirit through torque incantations.
Rotate test cycles whilst beseeching frictionless devotion to the Omnissiah.
Seal the bearing's activation with harmonic resonance verified.

user_prompt: Assist with metal caster a maintenance
prayer:
Undertake maintenance upon the metal caster with diligent mech-litany.
Inspect the metal caster's crucibles and petition its Machine Spirit for longevity.
Purge slag impurities and realign pouring manifolds.
Anoint during maintenance with oils of endurance from the Omnissiah's forge.
Restore the metal caster to flawless operation through final diagnostic hymns.

user_prompt: Consecrate the power cell before startup
prayer:
Consecrate the power cell prior to startup with electro-incantations.
Anoint terminals of the power cell and invoke its latent Machine Spirit.
Prime chemical matrices whilst beseeching stable voltage from the Omnissiah.
Initiate controlled startup flows in reverent sequence.
Monitor the power cell's blessed surge to affirm divine potency.

Prepare the gyroscope for consecration upon the alignment altar.
Invoke the gyroscope's inertial Machine Spirit with gyroscopic litanies.
Anoint spin-axis bearings and consecrate gyroscopic sensors.
Balance its sacred rotors in devotion to the Omnissiah's equilibrium.
Verify the gyroscope's consecrated precision through null-grav tests.
